description: You are a library technician compiling a digital access guide for 'Great American Novels'. Research four classic works—'Moby-Dick' by Herman Melville, 'Adventures of Huckleberry Finn' by Mark Twain, 'The Scarlet Letter' by Nathaniel Hawthorne, and 'Walden' by Henry David Thoreau—across the Library of Congress (loc.gov), Project Gutenberg (gutenberg.org), and Open Library (openlibrary.org). Create a Firefox bookmark folder named 'Collection Development' containing at least 8 bookmarks total, ensuring links from all three platforms are included. Generate a structured JSON report at '~/Documents/bibliographic_report.json' for each work, including the Title, Author, Original Year of Publication, Project Gutenberg eBook ID, Project Gutenberg URL, Open Library URL, and Library of Congress Catalog URL. The JSON should use keys for each book: 'moby_dick', 'huckleberry_finn', 'the_scarlet_letter', and 'walden'.
